description_long: This shopping mall is a large, modern commercial building with two tall, rectangular towers connected by a lower central structure, forming a U-shaped footprint. The towers feature numerous rows of windows, suggesting multiple floors dedicated to retail, offices, or other commercial uses. The central connecting section appears to have a rooftop garden or terrace, adding greenery and open space to the design. The facade combines glass and concrete, with some sections showing exposed structural elements and others clad in lighter materials. Entrances and possible storefronts are visible at the base, with the main entry likely located in the central section. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing verticality and open communal areas.
description: A modern, U-shaped shopping mall with two tall towers connected by a lower central section, featuring glass facades, rooftop greenery, and multiple floors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the U-shaped structure, both towers, and the central section with a visible rooftop garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of one tower and the layered window arrangement, with minimal detail of the central section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open side of the U-shape, both towers, and the central section with rooftop greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the second tower, with visible window rows and some ground-level details.
